Copy Blue Print - Week 3 – Session 6
0:00 – 6:15 – Technical difficulties
6:15 - Tim’s homework – Back pain:
Niche: Lower back pain avatar – the quickest way to possibly say it is the best (low back pain is
a good secondary name)
When people think of back pain – look for the best way to explain it (back pain sufferers, pain
warrior)
Tim used two avatar names from the avatar position in the software (jon really likes this)
· 	Back pain sufferers
· 	A pain warrior
10:00
Primary complaint –
Battling – constant lower back pain (battling is a good word its like warrior) dealing with or
suffering with back pain is not as strong as battling. This is a visceral verb
Secondary complaint
Avoiding
A complaint may not be avoiding prescription pain meds – it may be closer to
· 	Taking prescription pain meds
· 	Suffering from undesirable side effect
A copywriting mantra is to be succinct and short in general
Jon Benson shares a letter:
· 	Are you taking drugs?
· 	Dealing with Doctors?
· 	In pain?
Make the fields as short as possible to punch up the copy
13:00
Causes
That wont end your lower back pain
Perhaps you have tried going to Drs
That wont help and the reason will shock you…
That wont help you because….
“Doc deception” is an interesting idea
Are you being deceived by your doctor – this is a strong concept
The overarching idea it to think in terms of stories to write better copy in copypro
The ideas behind mistaken beliefs is telling a story – the pithy ways forces a way to tell a story
Remember to make the information in the fields short
Tim uses 3 word avatars (3 words is the max)
Pain sufferers is one way to say the avatar name
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 5 --

Pain warrior = tier 3 avatar
18:50 – Daniella
Primary cause “many small meals a day to “keep metabolism high” – this is good
“The truth” can be longer than other fields
Stream of thought can be longer copy (remember to keep the sentences short and concise) “This
is going to sound shocking but…”
Copy pro note: avoid periods in copypro. Let the program deal with punctuation.
“Meal overload” is a good mistaken belief name. There is rhythm in copy and it is important.
Good hooks and good copy has a good rhythm
Carbs depletion
Leave carbs off the dinner plate is better than cut carbs out of your diet – there is a left out
feeling” this is visual and visceral. I can see a dinner plate = visual.
Make sure to use words to get into the sense of people (scotts notes – VAK reminder for me).
· 	Visual words
· 	Auditory words
· 	Kinesthetic words
Back to Jons conversation
Carb depletion – technical term in body building. Depletion is slightly negative.
24:30
Primary cause - Mid afternoon munchies
· 	Meal desertion
· 	Glucose sabotage
· 	The exercise hoax
· 	Ego depletion
· 	The famine brain
The one that leaped out at Jon was – “glucose sabotage” because it sounded scary. Think of what
the average person would say. This would create some curiosity for the reader. “The famine
brain” would be another curious entry. This could be a whole email series.
The exercise hoax would make a good article
Caused triggers can trigger the primary cause
The famine brain won the votes in the class
30:30
Websites that Jon wrote
Oldschoolnewbody.com – starts off with landing page
(oldschoolnewbody.com/v5/index.php)
This is the 50 million dollar blue print – I can use this blueprint in copypro. I would need to fill
out every field in my niche in order to make it work. When I do this it is extra credit but I will
have a full sales letter to use.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

There are plenty of “did you know” questions used
There is push / push / pull used in the copy
Click bank ran traffic to this for years and it still works
33:40
The landing page formula: Negative idea _________ , negative idea _________ , negative idea
__________ positive idea (solution) __________ (when this process is used it helps the reader
get to the next link)
The secret routines of anti aging experts – reverse the aging process from a cellular level.
When Jon write this copy it was written for a specific demographic he knew.
There is a series of mistaken beliefs in this copy
Mistaken belief 1 – forget low fat diets
Not everything needs to be branded in copy but it helps. In the course Jon wants us to get used to
figuring out ways to brand ideas or concepts for our copy projects today and in the future.
(oldshoolnewbody.com/v5/index2.php)
Stop running in circles – mistaken beliefs
The whole lander was built on mistaken beliefs.
“Negative, negative, negative … stop … this doesn’t work” is how the copy was written
By the time the sales page is revealed (oldschoolnewbody.com/v5/index5.php)
Find ways to exclude people the product is not for through mistaken beliefs.
Duality is used to draw people in through believability
39:00
Sales page (oldschoolnewbody.com/v5/movement.php
Breakthrough research has proven it – was the best tested headline for the copy. This is positive
because all of the presale was negative
· 	Fact
· 	Fact
· 	Fact
Was used on the sales page instead of
· 	Did you know
· 	Did you know
· 	Did you know
In the copy to get to the sales page
Jon asks a ton of questions – as with plenty of historical copy
There are rhetorical questions used to draw in the reader
Jon made the copy sound like it was written by an old codger (like it came from a old man
pushing the limits) The copy had to be censored from going too far by Jon internally.
Proof was used on the sides so it didn’t have to break up the copy.
If Jon was to rewrite this again it would have been with chunky sentences (shorter sentences for
readability)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

42:00
Sub head – endless hours and “new age” work outs not required
Jon was beating on the Yoga crowd and the Cross fit crowd – deep down they were being called
pussys
Its old fashioned work outs – the average buyer was 56 years old
“The answer is found within the F4X method” – This is not the product it is the primary solution
The F4X method was modeled after P90X
44:00
Jon wrote a VSL 2 years ago and its pulling – the thyroid diet and its wasn’t converting right. Jon
left it alone for 7-8 months. There is almost a million dollars sold of product.
“Iodine resistance” – primary cause
4daythyroidfix.com – this is the VSL – this is an ugly VSL with the words put on the bottom like
closed captioning. Never take the words off a page of a VSL – people read and skim what is
written.
All of the copy is linked to one cause “Iodine resistance” this has been medically verified. Jon
wrote in his voice but his partner is a medical dr.
Jon told people it was a viral video
One problem is focused on here – this is “iodine resistance” – primary cause
The new version uses more story – emotions
49:50
1. 	Can you explain analogy and give an example: This is the best way to teach anything for
abstract or difficult ideas to present. Jons VSLs use tons of analogies to help people
Dimensionalize what they are reading / viewing.
Make the content visceral to the reader
51:35 – 53:00 – technical difficulties
53:10
2. 	Does copypro have different templates based upon warm or cold traffic? No, but it is a
good idea. Copypro is email which is by definition warm. This could be a item added in the
future. If someone is not product aware or solution aware it is cold traffic. Copypro is meant for
product aware and solution aware.
3. 	Can copypro be used in Facebook ads – Yes, some of the CTAs need to be changed.
Editing may be required to be in compliance with Facebooks policies.
4. 	Emails can be dedicated drops for cold traffic – this is off a list or warm people who have
this problem. Preppers would go to a preppers list. Buying a list of the same idea or topic is a
warm list.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

5. 	Dedicatedemails.com – this is an email lit broker service. They base the list off of topics:
· 	Political
· 	Health
· 	Outdoor
· 	Finance
They will drop emails off of their lists, I don’t get to see them names.
Olschoolnewbody – Clickbank watches gravity or how popular the item is. Health and wellness
is on the 2nd page with 58 affiliate. Look for pages with high gravity and affiliates to look at the
copy.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
